should_trigger: the corrections letter references Sheet A3 — locate it in the binder
build the sheet manifest for this plan PDF
show me Detail 2/S3.1 from the plan set
extract the sheet index and map sheet labels to PDF page numbers
open the M-101 mechanical sheet from this binder
should_not_trigger: what does state law say about egress
city-side review of this plan binder
rationale: Must activate when a plan PDF needs to be navigated by sheet reference (A3, S3.1, M-101 patterns) or when the sheet manifest is needed. Must NOT activate on full-binder review (adu-plan-review) or pure code lookups.
